Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Clockworker]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — Clockworker is an elderly human man and a member of the Advocates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — Clockworker has gray hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — Clockworker is a name used for Jyrid.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — Clockworker wears a full-body suit of bronze with the Advocate 'A' on his chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — Clockworker's helmet is bronze and functions with the hands of an ancient clock.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — Clockworker has the power to lock physical objects in place.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 42''' — Clockworker was a prominent member of the Advocates who betrayed them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Clockworker let Starhammer down.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
